message:
feat(beads): Create comprehensive HTML export redesign plan (Epic 2jxn)

8 beads created with proper dependency structure:

## Dependency Chain
x399: Task 1 - MessageGroup data structure (READY)
  ↓
1c6z: Task 2 - Message grouping algorithm
  ↓
27t2: Task 3 - Renderer updates for grouped messages
  ↓ ↓
1nk5: Task 4 - Template/lib.rs integration
ab1y: Task 5 - Premium glassmorphism styling
  ↓ ↓
2ebr: Task 7 - E2E test script
  ↓
1ihb: Task 8 - Final validation and user signoff

3cmm: Task 6 - Unit tests (depends on Task 2)

## Core Problem
Tool calls render as SEPARATE message bubbles instead of being
consolidated as icons in parent message header.

## Solution
1. Add MessageGroup data structure for consolidated rendering
2. Implement grouping algorithm to merge assistant+tools into groups
3. Update renderer to handle groups
4. Apply premium glassmorphism styling from Terminal Noir design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
